voice.participant_reconnecting: Connection interrupted — waiting for this participant to reconnect
voice.speaker: Speaker
voice.system_managed_audio_output: Audio output is managed by your device
voice.microphone_processing_active: Noise reduction and automatic gain are active.
voice.microphone_processing_system: Microphone processing is managed by your system on this route.
voice.microphone_processing_limited: Microphone processing is limited on this route.
voice.microphone_processing_status_native: Active in the browser or system
voice.microphone_processing_status_towk: Enhanced by Towk on this device
voice.microphone_processing_status_requested: Requested, status not exposed by this browser
voice.token_failed: Failed to get voice call token
voice.encrypted_unsupported: This browser does not support encrypted voice calls yet. Try the latest Firefox, Chrome, or Edge.
voice.signaling_failed: Could not reach the voice server. Check your network and try again.
voice.network_problem_reconnecting: Stay here. Towk is trying to reconnect you automatically.
voice.microphone_route_reconnecting: Towk is automatically looking for another audio input. You can also choose a microphone.
voice.microphone_join_denied: Microphone access was denied. You joined muted.
voice.microphone_join_not_found: No microphone was found. You joined muted.
voice.microphone_join_in_use: Your microphone is already in use by another app. You joined muted.
voice.microphone_join_failed: Could not start your microphone. You joined muted.
voice.microphone_denied: Microphone access was denied. Check your browser permissions and try again.
voice.microphone_not_found: No microphone was found. Choose another input device and try again.
voice.microphone_in_use: Your microphone is already in use by another app.
voice.microphone_failed: Could not turn on your microphone.
voice.microphone_processing_degraded: Enhanced microphone processing is unavailable. The call continues with browser audio processing.
voice.camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Check your browser permissions and try again.
voice.camera_not_found: No camera was found. Choose another camera and try again.
voice.camera_in_use: Your camera is already in use by another app.
voice.camera_failed: Could not turn on your camera.
voice.screen_share_blocked: Screen sharing was canceled or blocked.
voice.screen_share_unsupported: This browser or web app cannot share the screen. Screen sharing remains available on supported desktop browsers.
voice.screen_share_capability_unavailable: This browser or web app cannot share the screen. Screen sharing remains available on supported desktop browsers.
voice.screen_share_no_audio: Screen sharing started without audio. To share tab audio, use Chrome or Edge on desktop, choose a browser tab, and enable “Share tab audio”.
voice.audio_playback_failed: Could not resume call audio. Check your browser's playback permissions and try again.
voice.device_join_description: This account is already connected to the call.
voice.companion_description: Join with your microphone and call audio muted. You can still use your camera or share your screen.
voice.companion_description_camera_only: Join with your microphone and call audio muted. You can still use your camera.
voice.transfer_description: Disconnect the other device and continue the call here.
voice.device_limit_reached: Two devices are already connected. Transfer the call or cancel.
voice.device_audio_control_failed: Could not update the other device audio.
voice.speaker_switch_failed: Could not switch speakers. This browser or device may not support speaker selection.
voice.device_switch_failed: Could not switch to that device.
voice.media_device_failed: Could not access a media device.
voice.screen_stats_unavailable: Statistics are temporarily unavailable for this track.
voice.screen_stats_retrying: Towk will retry on the next sample.
voice.screen_share_frame_rate_unavailable: High frame rate is unavailable in this browser
voice.screen_stats_local_only: Updates every 2 seconds while open · 60-second local history · nothing is uploaded
